articles.headline: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
articles.description: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
images.caption: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: England sign off WC prep with 3-0 win as Rice, Gordon, Watkins score
articles.description: Returning Declan Rice set England on course for a morale-boosting 3-0 victory against Costa Rica after a heavy thunderstorm in Orlando delayed their final World Cup warmup match by an hour.

images.name: Declan Rice [1296x729]
images.caption: Declan Rice opened the scoring for England shortly after 10 minutes played.

images.name: Tuchel: England can't be World Cup favourites
images.caption: Thomas Tuchel says England can't be favourites because there are "proven winners" at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
articles.description: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

images.name: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
images.caption: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

articles.headline: Argentina wins as Messi scores in cameo in front of 88k in Alabama
articles.description: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

images.name: Messi celeb Arg Iceland_260609 [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.
images.alt: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.

article.headline: Khenissi scores as Tunisia win World Cup warm-up
article.description: Tunisia striker Taha Yassine Khenissi scored the only goal as the World Cup-bound side beat Comoros Islands 1-0.
article.linkText: Khenissi scores as Tunisia win World Cup warm-up

images.name: Tunisia's forward Taha Yassine Khenissi [1296x729]
images.caption: Tunisia have never made it out of the group stage in all their World Cup appearances.

peers.name: Tunisia's forward Taha Yassine Khenissi [1296x729]
peers.caption: Tunisia have never made it out of the group stage in all their World Cup appearances.

article.story:
Tunisia striker Taha Yassine Khenissi continued his successful return to the team after a doping ban by scoring the only goal as the World Cup-bound north Africans beat the Comoros Islands 1-0 in Croissy-sur-Seine, France on Thursday.

Khenissi, 30, missed the Africa Cup of Nations finals in January because of a one-year ban, later commuted to six months, but strengthened his chances of a trip to Qatar in November as he headed home 10 minutes into the second half.

The match was played behind closed doors at the small venue in the Parisian suburbs.

Tunisia play Brazil in Paris on Tuesday in their second World Cup warm-up game.

keyEvents.text: Ferjani Sassi (Tunisia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Comoros 0, Tunisia 1. Taha Yassine Khenissi (Tunisia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Hamza Mathlouthi.
Substitution, Tunisia. Issam Jebali replaces Wahbi Khazri.
Substitution, Tunisia. Sayfallah Ltaief replaces Saîf-Eddine Khaoui.
Substitution, Tunisia. Mortadha Ben Ouanes replaces Taha Yassine Khenissi.
Substitution, Tunisia. Hannibal Mejbri replaces Ellyes Skhiri.
Substitution, Comoros. Housseine Zakouani replaces Faïz Selemani.
Substitution, Comoros. Nasser Chamed replaces Youssouf M'Changama.
Substitution, Tunisia. Chaïm El Djebali replaces Ferjani Sassi.
Substitution, Tunisia. Nader Ghandri replaces Bilel Ifa.
Substitution, Comoros. Adel Mahamoud replaces El Fardou Ben Nabouhane.
Substitution, Comoros. Abdallah Ali Mohamed replaces Bendjaloud Youssouf.
